name: Iyọ deede (0.9% NaCl)
description: Isotonic crystalloid ito. Ti a lo fun isọdọtun omi IV. Ninu mọnamọna iṣọn-ẹjẹ, lo ni iṣọra - awọn iwọn nla ti o buru si coagulopathy (hyperchloremic acidosis, dilutional coagulopathy). Ilọkuro iyọọda fẹ ni ibalokan ibalokanjẹ ni isunmọtosi iṣakoso ẹjẹ.
indications: Isọdọtun omi (pẹlu iṣọra ni mọnamọna ẹjẹ)
Hypovolemia lati awọn okunfa ti kii-ẹjẹ-ẹjẹ
dose: Ibanujẹ iṣọn-ẹjẹ: Idiwọn si 1L max ni isunmọtosi iṣakoso ẹjẹ (haipatensonu iyọọda). Ifojusi SBP 80-90 mmHg ni ibalokanjẹ ti nwọle, 90 mmHg ni TBI. Hypovolemia ti kii-ẹjẹ-ẹjẹ: 500 milimita boluses, tun ṣe ayẹwo.
warnings: Awọn iwọn nla nfa hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis ati coagulopathy dilutional -- buru si triad apaniyan ni ibalokanje.
Lactated Ringer's (LR) jẹ ayanfẹ fun isọdọtun ibalokanjẹ iwọn didun nla.
MAA ṢE ṣe ifọkanbalẹ ti nwọle torso ibalokanjẹ ṣaaju iṣakoso iṣọn-ẹjẹ ti iṣẹ abẹ (hypotension iyọọda).

pediatric.dose: 20 milimita / kg IV bolus, tun ṣe ayẹwo. Tun max x3 (60 milimita/kg lapapọ) ṣe ṣaaju ṣiṣero awọn ọja ẹjẹ.

obstetric.note: Imupadabọ deede ni iṣọn-ẹjẹ obstetric. Atunlọ omi ibinu ti o yẹ fun isun ẹjẹ lẹhin ibimọ ṣaaju awọn ọja ẹjẹ ti o wa.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
